title: Create: Sakura Valley
description: Welcome to Create: Sakura Valley, a modpack based around mod Create.
body:
## 🌸 Welcome to **Create: Sakura Valley**

**Create: Sakura Valley** is a modpack built around the **Create** mod and its many powerful add-ons, offering deep mechanical gameplay alongside a rich and cozy survival experience.

Automation and engineering are at the heart of the pack, but food and farming play an equally important role. With mods like **Let’s Do**, **Farmer’s Delight** (and many add-ons), and **Create: Food**, you’ll have access to a huge variety of meals and ingredients. **Spice of Life: Onion** encourages a balanced diet, so remember to mix things up!

Build your own peaceful garden with diverse crops and enjoy the presence of **Seasons** configured to affect player temperature only, not crop growth. Survival is enhanced with **Tough As Nails**, meaning water and temperature management matter, so don’t forget your canteen before heading out on long journeys.

The world itself is beautifully expanded with mods like **Hopo’s Collection**, **YUNG’s Caves**, and **Luki’s Wonderful Rebuilt Structures**, bringing new life to trail chambers, ancient cities, villages, and more. On top of that, **William Wythers’** custom terrain creates stunning landscapes to explore.

For builders, the pack includes **Macaw’s** collection, **Cluttered**, and **Handcrafted**, offering endless decorative possibilities. Explore the world to discover **ribbits**, **relics**, and hidden **artifacts** scattered throughout the land.

Create, explore, survive, and relax **Sakura Valley** awaits 🌸
